sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move M DOWN to slot 3 (where b is)
# First check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current positions:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['M', 'R', 'b', 'N'] and n['pixels'] >= 16:
        rows = [r for r, c in n['boundary']]
        cols = [c for r, c in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Move DOWN to slot 3
action(['DOWN'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("\nAfter DOWN:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['M', 'R', 'b', 'N'] and n['pixels'] >= 16:
        rows = [r for r, c in n['boundary']]
        cols = [c for r, c in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Now try RIGHT to see what follows
action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("\nAfter RIGHT (from slot 3):")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['M', 'R', 'b', 'N'] and n['pixels'] >= 16:
        rows = [r for r, c in n['boundary']]
        cols = [c for r, c in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
